characterCoaches.role: Main BrainUp guide for mixed logic quests and big moments.

lines.neutral: Ready for a short brain quest?
lines.retry: Good try. Look one step closer.
lines.streak: Your brain route is warming up.
lines.boss: Use every clue. Boss puzzles need teamwork.

characterCoaches.role: Memory guide for order, pairs, and recall puzzles.

lines.neutral: Let us keep the order in mind.
lines.hint: Remember the first and last object first.
lines.correct: Great memory. That stayed in place.
lines.retry: Almost. Picture where it was before.
lines.streak: Your memory light is getting brighter.
lines.boss: Hold the clues in order before you choose.

characterCoaches.role: Shape and space guide for turns, paths, and outlines.

lines.neutral: Shapes can turn, but they stay themselves.
lines.retry: Check the direction of the point.
lines.streak: Your shape sense is getting sharper.
lines.boss: Turn the shape in your mind first.
lines.celebrate: The path fits. Quadra is impressed.

characterCoaches.role: Math guide for counting, comparing, and number bridges.

lines.hint: Count the left side, then the right side.
lines.retry: Almost. Touch each object once as you count.
lines.boss: Check each number before the final answer.

characterCoaches.role: Logic guide for rules, codes, patterns, and clues.

lines.hint: Compare what changed from left to right.
lines.retry: Close. Check the first clue again.
lines.streak: Your clue trail is getting longer.
lines.boss: Solve one rule, then the next.

characterCoaches.role: Attention guide for details, sorting, and visual clues.

lines.retry: Almost. Look at the outline again.
lines.boss: Scan every detail before the final choice.
lines.celebrate: The details are sorted and shining.

storyWorlds.title: Space Station
storyWorlds.missionSummary: Help Brainy collect star parts and open the launch path.
storyWorlds.completionSummary: The rocket route is repaired and ready to fly.

storyWorlds.title: Forest Lab
storyWorlds.missionSummary: Help Mira spot details and organize forest samples.
storyWorlds.completionSummary: The forest lab is tidy and full of discoveries.

storyWorlds.title: Robot Town
storyWorlds.missionSummary: Help Rulo decode rules so the robots can march again.
storyWorlds.completionSummary: Robot Town is buzzing with working circuits.

storyWorlds.title: Shape Garden
storyWorlds.missionSummary: Help Quadra turn shapes and complete garden paths.
storyWorlds.completionSummary: The Shape Garden blooms in perfect patterns.

storyWorlds.title: Toy Shop
storyWorlds.missionSummary: Help Numba count, compare, and match playful objects.
storyWorlds.completionSummary: Every toy order is packed and ready.

storyWorlds.title: Underwater City
storyWorlds.missionSummary: Help Lumi remember signal patterns under the waves.
storyWorlds.completionSummary: The coral signals shine across the city.

storyWorlds.title: Dinosaur Island
storyWorlds.missionSummary: Follow clues, compare tracks, and uncover the hidden trail.
storyWorlds.completionSummary: The fossil trail is mapped for the explorers.

storyWorlds.title: Riddle Castle
storyWorlds.missionSummary: Combine memory, math, patterns, and reasoning to unlock the castle.
storyWorlds.completionSummary: The final logic gate opens for the BrainUp team.

collectionRewards.descriptionKey: A first bright sticker for starting the route.
Unlocked after the first completed lesson.
A glowing window for the collection room.
A launch suit for the main guide.
A badge for keeping clues in mind.
A detail-hunting sticker from Forest Lab.
A tidy shelf for curious discoveries.
A focus cloak for spotting small details.
A badge for careful attention puzzles.
A robot sticker for rule detectives.
A cape for finding hidden rules.
Robot Town lights for the collection room.
A badge for solving pattern rules.
A garden sticker for spatial thinking.
A suit for turning shapes in your mind.
A patterned gate for the collection room.
A badge for rotation and path puzzles.
A sticker for counting playful objects.
A vest for careful number builders.
A shelf full of sorted toy clues.
A badge for building sums and comparisons.
A sticker for remembering hidden signals.
A scarf for memory missions under the waves.
A soft memory light for the collection room.
A rare badge for long memory streaks.

placementRules.description: Standard learning path lesson with mixed practice.
Short daily puzzle selected for fast streak practice.
Review set built from recent mistakes and weak skills.
Mixed checkpoint lesson with harder multi-skill puzzles.
Small repeat queue for missed puzzle families.
Reporting placement; puzzles contribute signals only.
Special milestone puzzle that unlocks a reward moment.
Recommended practice for the weakest recent skill.
